title: Rooftop Dog Run & Pet Amenity Addition
description: Owner requested rooftop dog run with artificial turf drainage and pet wash station added to amenity deck scope. Structural enhancement required to podium deck below.

title: EV Charging Infrastructure - Parking Garage
description: City of Austin updated code requires 20% of parking spaces to be EV-ready. Additional conduit panels and 40 Level 2 charging stations added to parking garage design.

title: Upgraded Lobby Finishes - Stone & Millwork
description: Developer upgraded lobby specification from porcelain tile to Calacatta marble with custom millwork feature wall and bronze fixtures throughout.

title: DFW Office Tower - Generator Upgrade
description: Owner upgraded emergency generator from 750kW to 1500kW to accommodate future data center tenant. Additional fuel tank and switchgear included.

title: DFW Office Tower - LEED Documentation Premium
description: Architect required additional commissioning and documentation for LEED Gold submission beyond original scope. Includes third-party commissioning agent.

title: DFW Office Tower - Tenant Amenity Fitness Center
description: Developer added full fitness center with locker rooms showers and cardio equipment room on floor 2. Not in original contract scope.

title: Miami Hotel - Caisson Depth Adjustment
description: Geotechnical condition required caissons 1-4 to be drilled to bearing stratum at El -38 ft versus plan depth of El -42 ft. Credit to owner for reduced scope.

title: Miami Hotel - Hurricane Impact Glass Upgrade
description: Florida Building Code amendment required all glass above floor 15 to be hurricane-impact rated. Glazing subcontract revised accordingly.

title: Miami Hotel - Luxury Spa Addition
description: Owner added 8000 sqft luxury spa on floor 3 including treatment rooms steam rooms and lap pool. Significant structural and MEP additions.

title: Denver Warehouse - Office Tenant Improvement Upgrade
description: Tenant (logistics firm) upgraded office finish package from standard to premium. Includes polished concrete exposed ceiling and custom reception millwork.

title: Denver Warehouse - Additional Dock Seals & Shelters
description: Tenant required dock seals and weather shelters on all 68 dock doors vs original spec of 40. Additional hardware and installation.

title: Chicago Medical - Helipad & Rooftop Landing Zone
description: Owner added hospital helipad on main hospital roof. FAA lighting wind indicators structural reinforcement and rooftop equipment coordination required.
